headline: Albemarle’s Lithium Role In New US$1 Trillion Minerals Consortium
summary: The U.S. administration has launched a $1 trillion international consortium to strengthen critical minerals supply chains. The initiative targets energy, minerals, and semiconductor inputs and is structured as a multinational effort. As a leading integrated lithium producer, Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) is positioned as a key participant in this new program. For Albemarle, the timing of this policy shift comes after a period of mixed stock performance. The shares trade around $173.03, with a 1-year...
